form.formComment: Comes here off a 44-day let-up. At the latest run faded in the straight 7th of 12 at Pukekohe on February 25 over 1600m, slow going 5 len behind Flashback carrying 58.5kg at $2.30. The race before that sat on the pace when 3rd of 14 at Te Rapa on January 30 over 1600m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Volunteer carrying 58.5kg at $2.70. Ready to break through.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 10 at this track on March 18 over 2200m, 6 len behind Emmy Award carrying 56.5kg at $2.80. The start before that made ground from midfield; 2nd of 14 at Trentham on March 1 over 1600m, slow going 0.1 len behind Summit Up with 58.5kg at $6.80. Great chance to atone.

form.formComment: Resuming after three-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign second of 10 at Tauherenikau January 2 over 2050m, soft track; 4 len behind Shes Wondering with 56.5kg at $5.60. When resuming last campaign sixth of 11 at Waipukurau November 16 over 1400m, 6 len behind Fleeting Glimpse carrying 58.5kg at $9.10. Expecting a effective return.

form.formComment: At the latest run set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 10 at this track on March 18 over 1650m, 1.5 len behind Belle's Charm carrying 58.5kg at $9.40. The race before that 5th of 9 at Waipukurau on February 15 over 1600m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Speedie O'reilly with 58.5kg at $8.40. Heading in the right direction and looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation second last of 13 at Wanganui February 21 2025 over 2060m, soft track; 26 len behind I Park carrying 58.5kg at $31.90. Previously first up; second last of 11 at Otaki December 26 2024 over 1600m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Northeasterly with 55.5kg at $17.10. Will take great benefit from this outing.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of six-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation failed to finish at Te Aroha September 19 over 3100m. Previously first up; third of 10 at New Plymouth Raceway February 14 2025 over 1400m, soft track; 2 len behind Kopare carrying 58kg at $12.70. Assuming he is back on track this prep so worth considering.

Previously second-up 3rd of 11 at Matamata on May 14 over 1600m, in the wet; 5 len behind Proudtobehere with 58.5kg at $38.90. Outclassed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Clipped a heel and fell passing the 500m hampering Magna Kata and High Penny.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign 11th of 14 at this track September 28 over 2200m, soft track; 8 len behind Unusual Gem carrying 58.5kg at $30.60. When resuming last campaign eighth of 11 at Hawera May 6 over 2100m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Taupo Dancer carrying 58.5kg at $31.20. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding (Tarzino - Okura Rose) has trialled on four occasions leading into today's race. Ninth over 1150m in a Te Awamutu trial on May 27. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 11 at Wanganui Mdn-Sw November 29 over 1600m, soft track; 4.5 len behind La Prima Dama with 56.5kg at $5.10. Previously first up; second of 12 at this track September 28 over 1400m, soft track; 1.75 len behind Vigor Happiness with 56.5kg at $2.90. Looks all set for a positive return.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 12 at this track on March 18 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Sant Maurici carrying 54kg at $26.30. The race before that sat on the pace before fading 7th of 11 at Wanganui on March 14 over 1340m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Lucky Penny carrying 56.5kg at $21.50. Definitely worth including.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old filly by Zed out of Boundary. At the most recent trial finished seventh on March 3 at Foxton over 1200m. Watch for any market moves.
